scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix desktop install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix desktop run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix desktop run build
